text: Now I'll query for HIGH-urgency incidents that are in 'triggered' status:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, service, assignee, created_at FROM pagerduty_incidents WHERE urgency = 'high' AND status = 'triggered' ORDER BY created_at"}
